ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Setup.Kingsbridge_General_Custom_Setting__c.Validation_Rule__c = False, $User.Alias <> 'IntUser', $User.Alias <> 'guest', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Partner_Opportunity', Number_of_Professional_Indemnity_Product__c > 0, TEXT( PI_Approval_Status__c ) <> 'Approved', CASE(StageName, 'Closed Won', 1, 'Agreement', 1, 0) = 1, TEXT(IAR_Needed__c) = 'Yes' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: OV 6:Please submit the record for Professional Indemnity Approval before moving ahead.
